# Tray pack Configuration（多层包装配置）

# Detailed Process of Tray Pack Configuration（ 多层包装配置详细流程）


### 新增配置


[图片1: null]


[图片2: null]

说明：
1、红框的批次&机型 两个必须填1个
2、批次维度：仅针对单一批次有效，更换批次该配置失效
3、机型维度：针对配置机型的维度生效，在该机型下，都采用配置。
Instructions：
1）For the batch number and model in the red box, at least one must be filled in (i.e., you are required to fill in either one or both).
2）Batch-level configuration: This configuration is only valid for a single batch. When the batch is changed, the configuration will become invalid.
3）Model-level configuration: This configuration takes effect for the specified model. All operations or settings under this model shall adopt this configuration.


### 新增包装关系


[图片3: null]


[图片4: null]

说明：
1、此处层级关系：需要从最外层设置到最内层；
2、同一层级若出现多个条码时，需要设置某一条码为主条码；
3、可包装数量由最上层容量决定，此处容量填写需要按照实际填写，若尾数箱强制关箱即可


Instructions：
1）Hierarchical Relationship: The setup must be applied from the outermost layer to the innermost layer.
2）Multiple Barcodes at the Same Hierarchy: If multiple barcodes exist at the same hierarchical level, one of them must be designated as the main barcode.
3）Packable Quantity: The packable quantity is determined by the capacity of the topmost layer. The capacity here shall be filled in according to the actual value; if there is a residual quantity (i.e., a partial carton), it shall be sealed as a closed carton by force.

---
